genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.also.title: Do you also need to report through SII?
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.also.subtitle: Select how your company must operate with TicketBAI. If you are also required to use SII, you will also need to report your VAT records.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.tbai.label: TicketBAI only
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.tbai.desc: Choose this option if your company only needs to submit its invoices through TicketBAI and is not required to use SII.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.tbai.extra: Typical case if you are not a large company, not registered in REDEME, do not belong to a VAT group and have not voluntarily opted into SII.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.label: TicketBAI + SII
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.desc: Choose this option if, in addition to TicketBAI, your company also needs to operate under SII.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.extra: Normally applies if you are required to use SII or have voluntarily opted in.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.info.title: When does SII usually apply?
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.info.bullet1: If you are a large company (transaction volume exceeding €6,010,121.04).
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.info.bullet2: If you are registered in REDEME.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.info.bullet3: If you belong to a VAT group.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.info.bullet4: If you have voluntarily opted into SII.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.footnote: If none of these cases apply to you, you will normally only need to operate with TicketBAI.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.volume.title: What is your annual billing volume?
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.volume.subtitle: If you exceed €6,010,121.04 in annual transaction volume, you will be classified as a Large Company from the following year and, as a general rule, will be required to use SII. If you do not reach that threshold and are not in REDEME, a VAT group or another mandatory SII situation, you may choose between voluntary SII or VERI*FACTU.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.volume.low.label: Up to 6,010,121.04 € per year
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.volume.low.desc: Not a Large Company by volume · If you are not in REDEME, a VAT group or another mandatory SII situation, you may choose between voluntary SII or VERI*FACTU in the next step.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.volume.high.label: More than 6,010,121.04 € per year
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.volume.high.desc: Large Company · SII mandatory from the following year for maintaining VAT record books through the AEAT.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.system.title: Which system do you prefer?
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.system.subtitle: There are options for both cases: one for companies not yet required to use SII. VERI*FACTU automatically forwards records to the AEAT; voluntary SII allows you to adopt SII and maintain VAT record books through that channel.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.verifactu.label: VERI*FACTU
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.verifactu.desc: Automatic and immediate forwarding of billing records to the AEAT · Includes QR code on the invoice · Recommended for SMEs not enrolled in SII.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.vol.label: Voluntary SII
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.vol.desc: Voluntary SII enrollment · Submission of billing records within SII deadlines · Useful if you need to operate under this system.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.obligation.title: Are you required to use SII?
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.obligation.subtit: SII is mandatory for large companies, VAT groups and those registered in REDEME. If you are not in any of these situations, you can choose another option.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.obligation.no.lab: No, I am not required to use SII
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.obligation.no.des: Up to €6,010,121.04 in annual transaction volume and not belonging to REDEME or a VAT group.
In this case, you can choose between voluntary SII or a VERI*FACTU system.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.obligation.yes.la: Yes, I am required to use SII
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.obligation.yes.de: If you are a Large Company (more than €6,010,121.04 in the previous year), belong to a VAT group or are registered in REDEME, SII will be mandatory and VERI*FACTU does not apply.

genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.verifactu.bullet1: Your billing system generates registration and cancellation records, a hash fingerprint and QR code.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.verifactu.bullet2: It also sends the records to the AEAT automatically, securely and continuously.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.verifactu.bullet3: Recommended for companies and professionals not enrolled in SII who are looking for a simpler operation.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.vol.bullet1: You electronically send billing records to the AEAT's Electronic Office.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.vol.bullet2: The general submission deadline is 4 days.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.sii.vol.bullet3: It is requested via form 036 and exempts you from submitting forms 347 and 390.
genericLabels.fiscal.onboarding.subq.important.note: if you opt for SII, whether mandatory or voluntary, you are outside the scope of VERI*FACTU.
